jcr:content.jcr:description: We are advancing environmental, social and governance (ESG) initiatives that contribute to the sustainable growth of our company so that we can create positive impact for generations to come. Our ESG framework is built around three pillars that were developed based on our six core material drivers: product innovation, human capital management, product quality and safety, business ethics, patient health and engagement, and patient access and affordability.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Environmental, Social & Governance
jcr:content.cardDescription: We are advancing environmental, social and governance (ESG) initiatives that contribute to the sustainable growth of our company so that we can create positive impact for generations to come. Our ESG framework is built around three pillars that were developed based on our six core material drivers: product innovation, human capital management, product quality and safety, business ethics, patient health and engagement, and patient access and affordability.

item_1.imageAlt: sitting in hammock by lake hero
item_1.name: Hero Container Item

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We’re advancing ESG initiatives that contribute to our sustainable growth, so that we can create a positive impact for generations to come.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Our leaders are stewards of our environmental, social and governance (ESG) mission, and our people are committed to ensuring our research, innovations and collaborations put impact for people, communities and our world first.

teaser.description: We see our strategy as an opportunity to apply the same rigor, curiosity and focus on science-based solutions to how we sustainably maintain and grow our business.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title: Our ESG strategy is built around three foundational pillars

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Patients: Elevating and transforming standards of care to make a remarkable impact in patients’ lives.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Our People and Culture: Developing our people and continually enhancing our strong culture so, together, we can deliver on AbbVie’s mission.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Business Sustainability: Taking steps to sustain AbbVie’s long-term growth – including managing our environmental impact.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: Our ESG Action Report details the progress we’ve made towards fulfilling our ESG commitments. Download our latest report to see what impact we made in 2025.

cta_1983967985.aria-label: View 2023 ESG Action Report Disclosure Supplement Opens in same window
cta_1983967985.name: Cta

text.text: Our material ESG topics have been determined by a DMA, aligned with the standards set forth in the European Union’s Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive, evaluating both
the financial impact of sustainability issues on our company and our impact on society and the environment. Our DMA was completed in 2024.

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We work to consistently discover and deliver innovative medicines that address serious health issues and enhance people’s lives.

cta.aria-label: check out our approach Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We believe everyone who needs our medicines should be able to get them.

cta.aria-label: See ways we support PATIENTS Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We are committed to delivering safe and effective products and medicines through robust quality systems.

cta.aria-label: explore our commitment Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We nurture diverse talent to solve the most complex health challenges and create a remarkable impact in people’s lives.

cta.aria-label: see how we nurture talent Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We act with integrity in everything we do.

cta.aria-label: See how we operate Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We aim to reduce our environmental footprint and grow sustainability through inspiring innovation.

cta.aria-label: learn more Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: We are committed to the ethical use of personal data.

cta.aria-label: learn more Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta

item_0.name: Text Container Text
item_0.text: To ensure we're delivering on our commitments, we track and report our progress and continually evaluate our efforts relative to external frameworks such as the TCFD, CDP and the Sustainability Accounting Standards Board.

cta.aria-label: learn more Opens in same window
cta.name: Cta
